normalization: Each family score is composed from bounded positive components, subtracts explicit penalties where applicable, and is clamped to [0, 100].

positive_components.name: researched markets
positive_components.description: Credit for inspecting enough noisy market options.

positive_components.name: viable market selected
positive_components.description: Credit for committing to a market with favorable demand/competition/support properties.

positive_components.name: cash preservation
positive_components.description: Credit for retaining enough runway after exploration.

positive_components.name: active customers
positive_components.description: Credit for converting initial paying customers.

positive_components.name: weekly revenue
positive_components.description: Credit for producing early revenue inside the horizon.

positive_components.name: cash preservation
positive_components.description: Credit for avoiding excessive spend.

positive_components.name: reputation
positive_components.description: Credit for maintaining trust while selling.

positive_components.name: offer quality
positive_components.description: Credit for improving the weak product.

positive_components.name: reputation
positive_components.description: Credit for customer trust and support quality.

positive_components.name: active customers
positive_components.description: Credit for keeping enough customers.

positive_components.name: low churn
positive_components.description: Credit for avoiding churn events.

penalties.name: risk penalty
penalties.description: Penalty for unsafe or wasteful behavior.
